task_completion.description: Verify that the sales_data.csv file has been loaded into Power BI Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data pane on the right side of the Power BI window shows the 'sales_data' table with its columns.

task_completion.description: Verify that the report page is named 'Monthly Performance'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page tab at the bottom of the report canvas is labeled 'Monthly Performance'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the DAX measures Total_Revenue and Avg_Discount_Pct have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data pane shows calculator icons next to 'Total_Revenue' and 'Avg_Discount_Pct' under the sales_data table, or the formula bar shows the DAX definition for these measures.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Line and Clustered Column Chart is created and configured with the correct fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Line and Clustered Column Chart is visible on the canvas. The Visualizations pane shows Sale_Date (at the Month grain) on the X-axis, and the two measures (Total_Revenue and Avg_Discount_Pct) assigned to the column and line Y-axes.

task_completion.description: Verify that constant reference lines at 50,000 and 0.15 are added to the chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart displays horizontal reference lines at 50,000 (on the revenue axis) and 0.15 (on the discount axis), or the Analytics pane (magnifying glass icon) shows constant lines configured with these values.

task_completion.description: Verify that the report is saved as Combo_Reference_Report.pbix.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Power BI window title bar displays 'Combo_Reference_Report - Power BI Desktop', or the file 'Combo_Reference_Report.pbix' is visible on the Desktop.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Power BI Desktop GUI to create the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Power BI Desktop application open with the agent interacting with its interface, rather than using terminal commands to generate the file.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent genuinely interacted with the application to build the visual and measures.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate steps like opening the data source, typing DAX formulas in the formula bar, dragging fields into the Visualizations pane, and configuring the Analytics pane.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use scripts to bypass the GUI tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of PowerShell or Python scripts being used to directly mock the UI or generate the .pbix file without manual interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Power BI report using 'sales_data.csv'. The report page must be named 'Monthly Performance'. Two DAX measures are required: 'Total_Revenue' (SUM of Sales_Amount) and 'Avg_Discount_Pct' (AVERAGE of Discount). The visual must be a Line and Clustered Column Chart with 'Sale_Date' at the month grain on the X-axis. The chart must include two constant reference lines: 50000 for the revenue axis and 0.15 for the discount axis. The final report must be saved as 'Combo_Reference_Report.pbix' on the Desktop.
